---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Information, pdfs, and social metrics of papers"
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
---


<!--Include academic icons or buttons-->
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

<!-- Notes: \* corresponding author; <sup>GS</sup> graduate student advisee; <sup>VS</sup> visiting scholar; ![](https://drganghe.github.io/files/images/highly-cited-paper-badge.png "ESI Highly Cited Paper"){width=20 fig-alt="Highly cited paper"} ESI [Highly Cited Paper](https://webofscience.help.clarivate.com/en-us/Content/esi-highly-cited-papers.html) (top 1%); ![](https://drganghe.github.io/files/images/hot-paper-badge.png "ESI Hot Paper"){width=20 fig-alt="Hot paper"} ESI [Hot Paper](https://webofscience.help.clarivate.com/en-us/Content/esi-hot-papers.html) (top 0.1%) 

Total citations as of January 2025:

- [Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com): 100,000 (h-index = 100)   
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=qc6CJjYAAAAJ&hl=en): 179,000 (h-index = 127, i10-index = 377) -->

## Selected Work

Heron, S., Lau, M.C., (2026). [Trust in Autonomous Human-Robot Collaboration: Effects of Responsive Interaction Policies](https://arxiv.org/html/2603.00154v2). \[[pdf](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.00154v2)\] \[[code and data](https://shaunaheron2/misty-paper)\] 


<!--Include social share buttons-->

<!--{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}-->
